name: Choir-Height
descriptionSeed: Tiered spires, choral certainty that is genuinely hard to bear, and a mercy that is entirely real and administered from above. The Seraphic Orders will forgive you, and it will not be a formality, and it will change you — and they will also judge you, and that will not be a formality either, and there is no appeal.
encounterFlavor: Seraphs whose kindness is real and whose certainty is total; a judgment being pronounced, correctly; someone forgiven and visibly remade by it.
questSeeds: A judgment was pronounced on an innocent and it BOUND, and the Orders cannot unmake it and will not admit that
A Seraph has begun to doubt, and doubt is not a thing this people has a procedure for
